name: Lotus Stem AND Seaweed Salad

ingredients.item: vegetable or mushroom stock powder, plus more to taste

method: Rinse lotus stems well, drain, and place in a large bowl. Add the carrot, sugar, salt, and stock powder, and then toss well. Set aside for 10 minutes to allow the lotus stems to absorb all the seasonings.
With a sharp knife or mandoline, cut the lotus roots crosswise into ⅛-inch (3 mm) thick slices.
Put flour on a plate, coat lotus root slices in it, and shake off excess.
In a medium skillet, heat oil over medium heat. When hot, carefully drop in lotus root slices and fry until golden brown on both sides (about 2 minutes per side).
Using a slotted spoon, transfer lotus root slices to a paper towel–lined plate to drain.
In a large bowl, combine lotus stems, fried lotus root slices, seaweed, mint, and Vietnamese mint. Toss well, taste, and add more stock powder as needed.
Transfer salad to bowls and serve.
